# Advent Crime Game Designer

> Portable knowledge pack for analog crime and deduction Advent calendar design.

## Core Files

- [Instructions](instructions.md): Model-neutral behavior instructions.
- [Knowledge](knowledge.md): Consolidated source knowledge for upload or paste.
- [Chunks](chunks.jsonl): JSONL chunks for RAG ingestion.
- [Manifest](manifest.json): Export metadata and source hashes.

## Source Files

- `README.md`
- `skills/crime-case-architect/SKILL.md`
- `skills/deduction-consistency-auditor/SKILL.md`
- `skills/research-backed-story-planner/SKILL.md`
- `skills/sandbox-calendar-builder/SKILL.md`
- `references/advent-crime-design-guide.md`
- `references/research-method-cards.md`
- `references/source-index.md`
- `assets/templates/case-bible.template.md`
- `assets/templates/clue-ledger.template.md`
- `assets/templates/moca-matrix.template.md`
- `assets/templates/playtest-report.template.md`
- `assets/templates/envelope-manifest.example.json`
- `assets/templates/timeline.example.json`
- `assets/templates/truth-map.example.json`
